headline: Netflix announced Q1 2026 financial results and the upcoming departure of founder Reed Hastings from the Board of Directors.
investor_impact: Reed Hastings' departure from the Board marks the completion of a long-term leadership transition and is largely symbolic, minimizing operational disruption. However, the concurrent release of Q1 2026 earnings will be the primary driver of near-term stock action as the market digests fundamental performance.
key_figures: Reed Hastings (Departing Chairman of the Board)
